variant: put CeraVe and La Roche-Posay moisturizers side by side in a table

request.message: put CeraVe and La Roche-Posay moisturizers side by side in a table

response_body.response: here's what i can pull together from general knowledge:  both have ceramides + humectants, so either locks in hydration at step 6 of your absorption ladder. CeraVe tends cheaper and more widely available; La Roche-Posay's thermal water is marketed for calming but the ceramide job is the same. if you're dealing with rosacea or chronic inflammation, La Roche-Posay cicaplast works as a PM occlusive too. which one are you leaning toward, or does your skin have a specific concern (dryness, sensitivity, acne)?

products.name: La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Baume B5
products.description: Healing balm with panthenol + madecassoside for compromised barrier.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.
